raw_records.text_sample: 2025 ANNUAL REPORT Transforming Today Empowering Tomorrow The cover design of our 2025 Annual Report serves as a powerful metaphor for vision and progress. The prominent circle, reminiscent of the pupil of an eye, conveys clarity and insight, symbolising the Group’s ability to look beyond today and maintain focus on transformation. The circle also represents a target, reinforcing precision and purpose in achieving our goals. At its centre, the globe signifies the future we aspire to — a world of possibilities that our services help connect. Radiating across space are dots and lines, weaving a network that reflects our global reach and seamless connectivity. Surrounding these are vibrant frames that form a window into innovation, showcasing the breadth and diversity of our products and services. All the elements form an eye that does more than look ahead. It illuminates tomorrow, echoing
